source.title: Engineering Bacillus pumilus alkaline serine protease to increase its low-temperature proteolytic activity by directed evolution

initial_request.research_problem: The mesophilic alkaline serine protease DHAP from Bacillus pumilus BA06 has high catalytic efficiency at ~50 °C but low activity at low temperatures, limiting its industrial use.
initial_request.target_object: DHAP (alkaline serine protease from Bacillus pumilus BA06)
initial_request.known_context: DHAP is a mesophilic enzyme with optimal activity around 50 °C. Previous site-directed mutagenesis efforts have been made to improve cold activity.
constraints: Maintain or improve thermostability while enhancing cold activity.
quantifiable_goals: Increase proteolytic activity at low temperature (15 °C) compared to wild-type.

evolution_trajectory.gap_or_uncertainty: Can directed evolution improve the cold activity of DHAP?
evolution_trajectory.hypothesis: Directed evolution can improve the cold activity of DHAP.
evolution_trajectory.observation: Directed evolution is a viable strategy to enhance cold activity.
evolution_trajectory.next_step_reason: Construct a mutant library to test the hypothesis.

evidence.quote_or_span: Here we attempted to improve the cold activity of DHAP via directed evolution.

evolution_trajectory.gap_or_uncertainty: Need to generate genetic diversity for screening.
evolution_trajectory.hypothesis: Error-prone PCR with dITP and DNA shuffling will create a diverse mutant library.
evolution_trajectory.decision: Construct a random mutant library using error-prone PCR and DNA shuffling.

tool_or_method.name: Error-prone PCR with dITP and DNA shuffling

evolution_trajectory.observation: More than 100,000 independent transformants were obtained.
evolution_trajectory.next_step_reason: Screen the library for improved cold activity.

evidence.quote_or_span: Finally, more than 100,000 independent transformants were harvested from the LB agar plates and used to isolate the plasmid DNAs, which were stored at -20 °C as the mutation library.

evolution_trajectory.gap_or_uncertainty: Which clones have improved cold activity and retained thermostability?
evolution_trajectory.hypothesis: A two-round screening process will identify variants with enhanced cold activity and maintained thermostability.
evolution_trajectory.decision: Screen the library using milk plate halo size, then 96-well plate assays at 50 °C and 15 °C, plus thermostability test at 60 °C.

tool_or_method.name: Two-round screening: milk plate halo, 96-well plate assays, thermostability test

evolution_trajectory.observation: The screening process was performed; 36 final clones were selected for further analysis.
evolution_trajectory.next_step_reason: Sequence the library to assess mutation frequency.

evidence.quote_or_span: another set of the supernatant samples was pre-treated at 60 °C for 15 min and the survival activity was measured at 50 °C
The caseinolytic activity was primarily assayed at both 15 °C and 50 °C for the 36 variants and the wt of DHAP.
Finally, more than 100,000 independent transformants were harvested from the LB agar plates and used to isolate the plasmid DNAs, which were stored at -20 °C as the mutation library.

evolution_trajectory.state_before: Library screened, but mutation quality unknown.
evolution_trajectory.gap_or_uncertainty: What is the mutation frequency and spectrum in the library?
evolution_trajectory.hypothesis: Sequencing random clones will reveal mutation frequency and bias.
evolution_trajectory.observation: Mutation frequency and spectrum were evaluated from 21 clones.
evolution_trajectory.next_step_reason: Identify specific variants with improved activity from the 36 final clones.

evidence.quote_or_span: To evaluate the mutation frequency, 21 independent transformants were randomly selected for DNA sequencing.
The caseinolytic activity was primarily assayed at both 15 °C and 50 °C for the 36 variants and the wt of DHAP.

evolution_trajectory.gap_or_uncertainty: Which specific variants have increased cold activity?
evolution_trajectory.hypothesis: Some of the 36 clones will show increased proteolytic activity at 15 °C.
evolution_trajectory.decision: Characterize the 36 clones and identify variants with increased activity at 15 °C.

tool_or_method.name: Proteolytic activity assay with casein and synthetic peptide substrates

evolution_trajectory.observation: Seven variants (P9S, A1G/K27Q, A38V, A116T, T162I, S182R, T243S) showed increased proteolytic activity at 15 °C towards both substrates.
evolution_trajectory.next_step_reason: Validate thermostability of these seven variants.

evidence.quote_or_span: Seven variants (P9S, A1G/K27Q, A38V, A116T, T162I, S182R, and T243S) of DHAP from B. pumilus were obtained via directed evolution.
all of the variants had increased proteolytic activity at 15 °C towards both the casein and synthetic peptide substrates.
Subsequently, seven variants were selected for further assays.
The caseinolytic activity was primarily assayed at both 15 °C and 50 °C for the 36 variants and the wt of DHAP.

evolution_trajectory.state_before: Seven variants identified with increased cold activity.
evolution_trajectory.hypothesis: Most variants will retain thermostability comparable to wild-type.
evolution_trajectory.decision: Assess thermostability of the seven variants.
evolution_trajectory.observation: Except T243S, the thermostability of the variants did not decrease compared to wild-type.
evolution_trajectory.next_step_reason: Quantify activity improvements of the seven variants.

evidence.quote_or_span: With the exception of variant T243S, the thermostability of these variants did not decrease in comparison with the wild-type enzyme.

evolution_trajectory.state_before: Seven variants with increased cold activity and mostly retained thermostability.
evolution_trajectory.gap_or_uncertainty: What are the quantitative improvements in caseinolytic activity?
evolution_trajectory.hypothesis: Variants will show enhanced caseinolytic activity at various temperatures, with some showing high fold-increases at 15 °C.
evolution_trajectory.decision: Measure caseinolytic activity of the seven variants at different temperatures.
evolution_trajectory.observation: All seven variants showed enhanced caseinolytic activity. A1G/K27Q and T162I had 2.62- and 2.41-fold increases at 15 °C, respectively.
evolution_trajectory.next_step_reason: Combine beneficial mutations to further improve activity.

evidence.quote_or_span: Figure 1 shows that all of the seven variants achieved enhanced caseinolytic activity at different temperatures compared with the wt.
the caseinolytic activity of two variants (A1G/K27Q and T162I) was increased by 2.62- and 2.41-fold at 15 °C, respectively, compared with the wt.

evolution_trajectory.state_before: Single variants show up to 2.62-fold improvement.
evolution_trajectory.gap_or_uncertainty: Can combining beneficial mutations yield additive or synergistic effects?
evolution_trajectory.hypothesis: Combining P9S, K27Q, and T162I will further increase cold activity.
evolution_trajectory.decision: Construct four new variants by combining P9S, K27Q, and T162I via site-directed mutagenesis.
evolution_trajectory.next_step_reason: Test combined variants for caseinolytic activity.

evidence.quote_or_span: Based on the above results, four new variants were constructed by the combination of three amino acid substitutions: P9S, K27Q, and T162I.
the caseinolytic activity of two variants (A1G/K27Q and T162I) was increased by 2.62- and 2.41-fold at 15 °C, respectively, compared with the wt.

evolution_trajectory.gap_or_uncertainty: Do combined variants show further improved activity?
evolution_trajectory.hypothesis: Combined variants will exhibit higher caseinolytic activity than single variants.
evolution_trajectory.decision: Measure caseinolytic activity of combined variants at 15 °C and 50 °C.
evolution_trajectory.observation: P9S/K27Q, P9S/T162I, and P9S/K27Q/T162I showed ~5-fold increase at 15 °C and 2.8-fold at 50 °C compared to wild-type.

evidence.quote_or_span: the caseinolytic activity of the mutant (P9S/K27Q, P9S/T162I, P9S/K27Q/T162I) was increased by about 5-fold and 2.8-fold compared with the wt at 15 °C and 50 °C, respectively.

evolution_trajectory.hypothesis: Some combined variants may have altered thermostability.
evolution_trajectory.decision: Assess thermostability of combined variants and compare with single variants.
evolution_trajectory.observation: T243S and K27Q/T162I showed improved thermostability; S182R and P9S/K27Q/T162I showed reduced thermostability.
evolution_trajectory.next_step_reason: Perform structural analysis to interpret results.

evidence.quote_or_span: The slope of two variants (T243S and K27Q/T162I) was slower than that of the wt, indicating that their thermostability was improved.
the thermostability of two variants (S182R and P9S/K27Q/T162I) was reduced compared with the wt.

evolution_trajectory.state_before: Experimental data on activity and thermostability collected.
evolution_trajectory.gap_or_uncertainty: What structural basis explains the observed effects?
evolution_trajectory.hypothesis: Homology modeling will reveal how substitutions affect flexibility, electrostatics, and stability.
evolution_trajectory.decision: Perform homology modeling of DHAP and analyze substitution sites.
evolution_trajectory.observation: P9S may increase flexibility without thermostability loss; loop substitutions (A38, T162, S182) may increase kcat but can decrease thermostability; K27Q may change electrostatic potential and increase cold activity.
evolution_trajectory.next_step_reason: Conclude on integration of cold activity and thermostability.

evidence.quote_or_span: the four substitution sites (P9, A38, T162, and S182) were predicated to be exposed on the protein surface.
substitution of P9 with S9 may lead to more flexibility in this region of the protein (Fig. 7a)
substitution of P9 with S9 in DHAP did not result in loss of thermostability (Fig. 4b).
These loop regions are thought to confer flexibility in any given protein.
The combined variants of P9S/K27Q and P9S/T162I exhibited an approximate 5-fold increase in caseinolytic activity at 15 °C and almost no loss of thermostability.

evolution_trajectory.state_before: Combined variants P9S/K27Q and P9S/T162I show ~5-fold increase at 15 °C with no thermostability loss.
evolution_trajectory.gap_or_uncertainty: Can cold activity and thermostability be integrated into a single variant?
evolution_trajectory.hypothesis: Enhancement of cold activity and thermostability can be integrated into a single variant.
evolution_trajectory.decision: Conclude that P9S/K27Q and P9S/T162I achieve the goal.
evolution_trajectory.observation: P9S/K27Q and P9S/T162I achieved ~5-fold increase in caseinolytic activity at 15 °C without thermostability loss. Effects of individual substitutions are accumulative.

evidence.quote_or_span: four combined variants were constructed from three sites: P9, K27, and T162, and catalytic activity with the macromolecular substrate casein was found to be further increased, especially at low temperature.
the variant (P9S/K27Q) showed an increase in caseinolytic activity of more than 5-fold compared with the wt
the effects of individual substitutions on catalytic activity may be accumulative and can be integrated into a single variant
the enhancement of cold activity and thermostability can be integrated into a single variant of bacterial alkaline protease.
The combined variants of P9S/K27Q and P9S/T162I exhibited an approximate 5-fold increase in caseinolytic activity at 15 °C and almost no loss of thermostability.

metrics: Fold increase in caseinolytic activity at 15 °C
success_verification.final_conclusion: Directed evolution successfully improved the cold activity of DHAP. Combined variants P9S/K27Q and P9S/T162I achieved ~5-fold increase in caseinolytic activity at 15 °C without loss of thermostability, demonstrating that cold activity and thermostability can be integrated.
limitations: Some variants (e.g., T243S, S182R, P9S/K27Q/T162I) showed reduced thermostability.
The study focused on caseinolytic activity; performance on other substrates may vary.
Structural interpretations are based on homology modeling, not experimental structures.
